items.author: Sarah M.
items.text: Best supermarket in the UAE! Products are always fresh and prices are excellent. Highly recommend.

items.author: James A.
items.text: Amazing delivery — my order arrived in just one hour! Competitive prices, very fresh products.

items.author: Priya S.
items.text: Wide range of products and great quality. Staff are always friendly and very helpful.

items.author: Mohammed H.
items.text: Best weekly deals in the UAE! The WhatsApp catalog is super convenient. New offers every week.

items.author: Nora W.
items.text: Premium supermarket, clean and well-organised. Imported products always available at fair prices.

items.author: Khalid R.
items.text: Great shopping experience every visit. The WhatsApp channel keeps me updated on the best offers.

about.title: About Us
about.hero_description: Bringing fresh, quality groceries to families across the UAE.
about.story_text: Trolleys Supermarket is a trusted grocery destination serving communities across the UAE. We take pride in offering fresh produce, quality products, and friendly service at fair prices. Every day, we work to make grocery shopping a pleasant experience for you and your family.
about.value_1_text: We handpick the freshest produce daily. Quality is never compromised.
about.value_2_text: We're proud to be part of your neighbourhood and support local families.
about.value_3_text: Quality groceries at prices that respect your budget. Always.
about.value_4_text: Friendly staff, clean stores, and a welcoming atmosphere every visit.
about.cta_description: Fresh products, great deals, and a warm welcome await you at any of our branches.

delivery.title: Delivery Information
delivery.subtitle: Fast & Reliable Delivery Across the UAE
delivery.step_1_text: Shop online or call your nearest Trolleys branch to place your order.
delivery.step_2_text: Select a convenient delivery slot that suits you.
delivery.step_3_text: Our team delivers fresh products straight to your doorstep.

faqs_list.question: What are your store hours?
faqs_list.answer: All Trolleys branches are open daily from 7:00 AM to 11:00 PM, including weekends and public holidays.

faqs_list.question: Do you offer home delivery?
faqs_list.answer: Yes! We offer same-day home delivery across Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Sharjah. Minimum order is 50 AED and delivery fees start from 10 AED.

faqs_list.question: How do I find the nearest branch?
faqs_list.answer: Visit our Stores page to find all Trolleys locations with addresses, phone numbers, and directions.

faqs_list.question: Do you have a loyalty program?
faqs_list.answer: Yes, we have the Trolleys Rewards program. Ask at any branch to sign up and start earning points on every purchase.

faqs_list.question: Can I return or exchange products?
faqs_list.answer: Yes, we accept returns and exchanges within 3 days of purchase with the original receipt for non-perishable items.

faqs_list.question: Do you accept credit cards?
faqs_list.answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards, cash, and digital payment methods including Apple Pay and Google Pay.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Last Updated: April 19, 2026
privacy.intro: Trolleys Supermarket LLC is committed to protecting your personal information in accordance with the UAE Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL) Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide to us directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, and delivery address when you register, place an order, or contact us. We also collect usage data, device information, and cookies when you use our website.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your information to process orders and deliver products, send updates about your orders, improve our services, send promotional offers with your consent, comply with legal obligations, and prevent fraud and ensure security.

sections.title: 3. Sharing Your Information
sections.content: We do not sell your personal data. We may share your information with delivery partners to fulfill your orders, payment processors to handle transactions, and government authorities when required under UAE law.

sections.title: 4. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with UAE legal requirements. You can request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
sections.content: Under the UAE PDPL, you have the right to access your personal data, correct inaccurate data, request deletion of your data, withdraw consent at any time, and file a complaint with the UAE Data Protection Office.

sections.title: 6. Contact Us
sections.content: For any privacy questions or to exercise your rights, please contact our Data Protection Officer at: privacy@trolleys.ae or call +971 4 000 0000.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Last Updated: April 19, 2026
terms.intro: Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using the Trolleys Supermarket LLC website. By using our website, you agree to be bound by these terms.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By using our website and services, you confirm that you are at least 18 years old, have the legal capacity to enter into these terms, and agree to comply with all applicable UAE laws and regulations.

sections.title: 2. Website Use
sections.content: You may use our website for lawful purposes only. You must not misuse our website, attempt unauthorized access, transmit any harmful or offensive content, or use our website in any way that violates UAE law.

sections.title: 3. Products & Pricing
sections.content: All prices are in UAE Dirhams and include VAT where applicable. We reserve the right to change prices at any time. Product availability is subject to stock levels at the time of ordering.

sections.title: 4. Orders & Delivery
sections.content: Orders are subject to acceptance and availability. We will notify you if we are unable to fulfill your order. Delivery times are estimates and may vary due to circumstances beyond our control.

sections.title: 5. Returns & Refunds
sections.content: We accept returns of non-perishable items within 3 days of purchase with the original receipt. Perishable items can only be returned if defective or not as described. Refunds will be processed within 5-7 business days.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by UAE law, Trolleys Supermarket LLC shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our website or services.

sections.title: 7. Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Courts of Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: Last Updated: April 19, 2026
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Trolleys Supermarket LLC uses cookies and similar technologies on our website in accordance with UAE regulations.

sections.title: 1. What Are Cookies
sections.content: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit our website. They help us recognize your device, remember your preferences, and improve your browsing experience.

sections.title: 2. Types of Cookies We Use
sections.content: Essential cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be disabled. Performance cookies help us understand how visitors use our website. Functionality cookies remember your preferences like language and region. Marketing cookies track your browsing to deliver relevant advertisements.

sections.title: 3. Managing Cookies
sections.content: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of our website.

sections.title: 4. Third-Party Cookies
sections.content: We use Google Analytics to understand website usage. These external services may place their own cookies on your device. We do not control these cookies and recommend reviewing the privacy policies of these services.

sections.title: 5. Updates to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting a notice on our website.

sections.title: 6. Contact
sections.content: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at: privacy@trolleys.ae

footer.description: Your trusted supermarket in the UAE. Fresh products and high-quality service in Dubai, Sharjah, and Ajman.
